sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) palm, palm-branch, i.q. כַּף No. 4, the feminine form being often used of inanimate things (Hebr. Gram. § 105, 2). Isa 9:13 19:15 , כִּפָּה וְאַגְמֹון palm and rush, a proverbial expression for great and little things, those which are noble and ignoble.

(2) Generally a branch, Job 15:32.
